name: Tamale Pie Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Jack or American cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sausage until lightly browned, stirring to keep crumbly.
2. Pour off excess fat, add beef and cook until browned. Stir in garlic, onion, and celery and cook until vegetables are tender but not browned.
3. Stir in tomatoes, corn, salt, and chili powder. Simmer about 15 minutes.
4. Slowly stir in cornmeal and cook until thickened.
5. Stir in olives. Transfer to a greased 2-quart casserole dish and top with cheese.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
